positive: A majestic, stylized forest scene bathed in celestial bioluminescence. Giant, stylized flora featuring intricate geometric patterns and deep teal, sapphire blue, and neon magenta accents. The scene is centered, dominated by a massive, crystalline moon emitting soft light rays. Interspersed among the trees are glowing, stylized constellations and gentle cosmic dust clouds. Composition should feature clean, thick silhouettes and stark contrast against a deep indigo or midnight blue background. Art style should evoke elegant symmetry, highly detailed linework, and a clean, almost symmetrical repeating pattern suitable for screen printing on apparel. Maximalist yet organized, perfect for a high-contrast t-shirt print.
negative: blur, text, signature, watermark, low quality, extra limbs, bad anatomy, poorly drawn, cropped, amateur, grainy, abstract, noise, bokeh
